description_long: This is a rectangular, carton-style bottled water product labeled 'Paradise Apple' with a prominent image of red apples and water splashes on the front. The packaging is primarily white with blue and green accents, and features detailed nutritional information and recycling symbols on the sides and back. The front label includes a green heart-shaped icon indicating '100% natural' and a red sun logo at the top. The carton has a flat top with a small, dark-colored screw cap for pouring or drinking. The surface is glossy and smooth, with printed branding and product information wrapping around all sides. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban environment.
description: A rectangular, white and blue apple-flavored bottled water carton with a screw cap and detailed printed branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing recycling symbols, part of the product name, and a portion of the apple image.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'Paradise Apple' branding, apple imagery, and the sun logo prominently.
description_view_2: Opposite side view featuring a barcode and additional product information.
description_view_3: Back view with extensive nutritional facts and text details.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'Paradise Apple' in large blue letters, a red sun logo at the top, a green heart-shaped '100% natural' icon, and images of apples with water splashes. Sides and back include nutritional facts, recycling symbols, barcode, and product information in black and gray text.
attribute_cap_type: Screw cap; small, round, dark-colored (likely black or gray), located at the top center of the carton.
attribute_transparency: Opaque; the carton material does not allow visibility of the liquid inside.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, flat-topped neck with a small circular opening for the screw cap; no visible ridges or flares, integrated into the rectangular carton design.
